---
agent: edit
description: Replace numeric bibliography citations with inline source links, remove bibliography section, and fix Mermaid blocks.
---

Replace the [<number>] bibliography links with the actual link to the source, keeping the number as link text but the URL. Keep a space between adjacent citations links. Remove the bibliography section afterwards. 
Convert Mermaid fenced code blocks to `<pre class="mermaid">...</pre>`.
